name: Chicken and Sausage in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large heavy skillet.
2. Add garlic and sauté until light golden. Remove the garlic and set aside.
3. Prick the sausage links several times and sear them in the hot oil. Remove and set aside, covered.
4. Brown the chicken well on all sides in the same skillet. Remove and set aside, covered.
5. Pour 1 cup of the drippings into a large Dutch oven or casserole pot. Discard the remaining drippings (or save for another use). Do not wash the skillet; it will be needed later.
6. Crush the tomatoes by hand and add them with their juice to the pot. Add tomato paste, salt, freshly ground pepper, basil, and reserved garlic. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
7. Add the sausage links and simmer covered for 20 minutes.
8. Add the chicken pieces and cover; simmer for another 20 minutes.
9. Deglaze the skillet with red wine by stirring it into the sauce. Continue to simmer for a final 10 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley. Serve with pasta and freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
